name: The Tomb of Corruption
short_description: Explore procedurally generated dungeons and slash hordes of monsters in THE TOMB OF CORRUPTION! - A 3D action RPG with rogue-lite elements. Fully customize your melee and ranged weapon with hundreds of upgrades, unlock skills, upgrade your armor and get ready to enter the voxel dungeon!
detailed_description:
An alien disease is spreading and needs to be contained!
You're taking on a role of a soldier on duty at the "TH1" military facility. Your task - destroy an evergrowing corruption that's spreading through the countless ancient ruins located under the facility. This corruption can open portals to a different dimension full of monsters, can you destroy it?

  • Explore three different procedurally generated dungeons with increasing difficulty and monster variety.
  • Loot chests to obtain parts used for crafting and upgrading.
  • Fight waves of enemies that dynamically change as their health decreases.
  • Defeat powerful bosses to unlock new upgrade tiers!
  • Unlock new movement skills and weapon abilities.
  • Chat with other soldiers and buy power-ups in the facility.

Most of the chests in the dungeons are corrupted, meaning you will have to defeat multiple waves of enemies before opening them.

  • Each monster type has unique attacks, meaning a different strategy to defeating them.
  • Enemies visually get torn and damaged as you hit them.
  • You can stun enemies by parrying their attacks, giving you time to deal more damage.
  • Enemies killed with your melee weapon will drop health and arrows, which can be used to fire the more powerful crossbow, which creates a combat loop.
  • Hitting with your melee charges up an extremely powerful ultimate ability.
  • If you hit enemies from the right direction, you can destroy weak spots and deal more damage!
  • If you die in the dungeon, you will lose some of you items, so be careful!
  • By crafting a boss room key, you can get access to the boss portal, which will allow you to unlock the next dungeon.

There are multiple ways you can upgrade your character:

  • Upgrading your suit = increasing your health and armor.
  • Unlocking skills: for example double jump, dashing, minimap upgrades, etc.
  • Upgrading weapons: You can dynamically change your melee weapon type (sword, katana, hammer...), as well as the weapon's grip and ultimate ability. You can also change the crossbow type and arrow type.
